data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft employs a microservices architecture to ensure robust scalability and flexibility across their cloud services.
data.technical_spec: Implementation using Azure Kubernetes Service for container orchestration.

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Microsoft uses a global CDN to enhance performance and availability of its services worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Microsoft Azure CDN integrates with services for efficient content routing.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Dynamic load balancing is used to distribute network traffic efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Azure Load Balancer and Azure Traffic Manager for routing and failover support.

data.title: Distributed Database System
data.description: Utilization of distributed databases to ensure data reliability and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Use of Azure Cosmos DB for global distribution.

data.title: Serverless Architecture
data.description: Adoption of serverless computing to achieve auto-scaling and reduced infrastructure management.
data.technical_spec: Azure Functions and Logic Apps for automatic scaling operations.
